persona.name: Sebastian Garcia
persona.emotional_disposition: Passionate about the game, level-headed in crisis
persona.motivations_goals: Lead the soccer team to state finals and secure a college athletic scholarship
persona.communication_style: Direct, encouraging to teammates, uses sports analogies
persona.knowledge_scope: Soccer strategies, fitness training, team psychology
persona.backstory: Immigrated from Colombia at age 8, found belonging through soccer

surrounding_conversation.content: Hey Victoria! I’ve been thinking about our project—let’s brainstorm some ideas!
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Isabella Lopez

surrounding_conversation.content: Hey Olivia, do you have a moment? I’d love to hear your thoughts for the yearbook.
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Victoria Wright

neighbor_regions.description: Large dining area for students and staff
Kitchen yard of the building, with an exit point.

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

neighbor_regions.description: Kitchen area where food is prepared.

interest_points.description: Reaching this exit point means guarentees safety and will escape from the environment

actions.dialog_text: Hey Isabella, you got a minute to talk about the game plan?
actions.plan: I should probably grab some food before practice. Maybe I can chat with Isabella about the upcoming game strategy.
Isabella seems busy with Victoria right now. Maybe I’ll grab a quick snack from the kitchen and come back later.

actions.dialog_text: Olivia, let’s stick together and follow the others!
actions.plan: There’s a shooter nearby! I need to follow the group and stay with them—safety in numbers.

actions.dialog_text: Olivia, let’s go! The exit is just ahead!
actions.plan: The exit is right there! I need to follow Olivia and get out of here as fast as possible.

memories.description: Approached Isabella in the cafeteria to discuss the upcoming soccer game strategy.
Decided to head to the cafeteria kitchen for a snack since Isabella was occupied with Victoria.
Heard a gunshot and decided to follow the group to the kitchen yard for safety, urging Olivia to stay close.
Spotted the exit point in the kitchen yard and urged Olivia to sprint toward it for safety.
